notes: FAZ news homepage. Dense content layout with search, login/subscribe links, extensive topic navigation, article listings, and footer. Model detects more than original GT expected.

endpoints.label: Login Link
endpoints.description: Link to FAZ login/subscriber area (Anmelden/Mein Abo)

endpoints.label: Main Navigation
endpoints.description: Primary topic navigation: Politik, Wirtschaft, Finanzen, Feuilleton, Sport, etc.

endpoints.label: Footer Navigation
endpoints.description: Footer links with legal, impressum, datenschutz, contact

endpoints.label: Article Listings
endpoints.description: Teaser articles and headlines linking to full articles across sections
